name: 失踪した友人の部屋に残されていたゲーム
slug: 失踪した友人の部屋に残されていたゲーム
short_description: would like you to solve the mystery contained in the game.
detailed_description:
To begin.

I am currently missing a friend of mine.

This is a fact, and I have taken note of its importance in the writing process.

I hope that everyone involved understands that there is a possibility of misunderstanding.

If you believe my story, and if you know of anyone who does, please feel free to contact me, as my contact information is provided below.

About this game.

This game is a 3D adventure horror game that progresses in a single player FPS perspective.

A friend has lost track of his whereabouts.

A mysterious game was left on his computer.

In order to find his whereabouts, this game began to be researched.

Several stages and texts can be accessed from the title screen.

Uneven stage compositions and scattered texts may hide unknown fears.

Game Overview.

This mysterious game became a hot topic around 2019 and was discussed on the internet.

It has passed through many hands.

You will find information hidden in this game.

It consists of 5 stages.

1,FPS game mode to earn scores

2,A mode in which you walk around an apartment building looking for lost items

3,A mode in which you walk through a grassy field stage and complete tasks.

4,A mode to walk through a mysterious space and search for the next path

5,Mode to proceed to the depths of the water

This work is a work of fiction.

There are no restrictions regarding video distribution.
